curation.synopsis: After five years of fruitless search through the stellar wilderness, the Dark Angels battle-barge Spear of Truth finds traces of human civilization in the DX-619 system. The world of Byzanthis lies open before two very different commanders. Chapter Master Merir Astelan, a Terran veteran, insists on offering the inhabitants the chance to join the Imperium on their own terms. Chapter Master Belath, a younger Calibanite recently raised to higher command, sees only a population to be conquered. Their argument over how compliance should be brought to Byzanthis becomes a mirror of the fracture line running through Lion El'Jonson's Legion itself — a Legion in which any two commanders rarely agree on a single course of action.
